text.title: rust-backend Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for rust-backend as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Adding a new AppError variant and relying on a wildcard arm in IntoResponse.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Wildcard arms hide the contract break. Require explicit per-variant match at code review.

failure-mode.description: Axum 0.6 vs 0.7 handler signature mismatches in LLM-generated code.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: API changed significantly between versions. Read Cargo.toml first to pin the version.

failure-mode.description: Agents copy lifetime annotations (UserService<'a>) blindly, failing on tokio::spawn.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Tokio requires 'static bounds. Prefer Arc<Database> ownership over borrowed references.

failure-mode.description: mockall cannot mock structs with sqlx::query! macros due to file-path embeddings.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Use trait abstractions that the agent must derive instead of raw struct mocking.

failure-mode.description: LLMs forget to add IntoResponse for new AppError variants.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Build passes (default impl) but runtime panics. Require exhaustive match audit.

failure-mode.description: Password hashing inlined in async fns instead of spawn_blocking.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Blocks the async executor. Argon2/bcrypt must run off-thread via spawn_blocking.

failure-mode.description: Validator integration leaks entire ValidationErrors debug string in responses.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Expose individual field errors in structured format, not raw error debug output.
